title: Gear Aid ReviveX Pro Cleaner 4x Concentrate Outdoor Equipment Clothing - 12 oz
description:
Keep your performance wear, sleeping bags, footwear, and more clean after a long outing with Gear Aid's Revivex Pro Cleaner. This tough on dirt cleaner restores breathability, water repellency and warmth. This cleaner is ideal for wool, silk, synthetic insulation, and GORE-TEX fabrics. Pro Cleaner is free of fragrances, softeners, and optical brighteners.
